ocr_page_audit.coordinate_rule: Internet Archive public page order: djvu.xml OBJECT index == /page/n{leaf}. Do not use PARAM PAGE as Archive leaf.
notes: Official OCR is suitable as translation draft input, but scan review is required for dense multi-column pages, index pages, tables, captions, and very short OCR pages.
